MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff Thomas McNutt.
Evanthia M. Spanos of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel.
Abigail Adams of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (415) 527-2803, appearing for defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.
Jon C. James of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant Foster Wheeler, LLC.
Shelly K. Tinkoff of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing for defendant Lamons Gasket Company.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling amended as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 36(a). Conditional non-opposition by Defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.

The current trial date of April 25, 2022 is vacated. The new trial date is July 25, 2022 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is August 5, 2022. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.

Fact and expert discovery shall track the new trial date and close 14 and 7 days before trial respectively, per oral stipulation of the parties at the hearing.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than June 10, 2022. Responses to the demand are due no later than June 24, 2022. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by July 15, 2022 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, July 21, 2022 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
